item.title: “The View's” Alyssa Farah Griffin Shares First Photo of Baby Boy, Justin Patrick Griffin Jr. (Exclusive)
item.description: The baby boy was born Feb. 10

item.title: J. Alexander Says Fellow “ANTM” Judge Tyra Banks Has Not Visited Him Since His 2022 Stroke
item.description: Alexander does have the support of some members of his 'America's Next Top Model' family

item.title: Who Is Maya Hawke's Husband? All About Musician Christian Lee Hutson (and Their Valentine's Day Wedding!)
item.description: Maya Hawke and Christian Lee Hutson got married on Valentine's Day 2026

item.title: Dorinda Medley Joins “RHONY” Reboot “The Golden Life” Following Jill Zarin's Firing
item.description: Zarin was fired from the show on Feb. 10 over racist comments she made about Bad Bunny's 2026 Super Bowl halftime show performance

item.title: Gordon Ramsay Says His 'Dysfunctional' Childhood Taught Him to ‘Never Take Things for Granted’ (Exclusive)
item.description: "Nothing comes easy in life," the celebrity chef tells PEOPLE ahead of his new Netflix series, 'Being Gordon Ramsay'
